items.text:
Lost and Found Notice

All unclaimed items left in the Lost and Found office, Student Union Room 110, will be donated to charity on Friday, June 12, at 3:00 PM. Items must be picked up before this date. A processing fee of $2 applies to electronics reclaimed after May 30.

questions.stem: According to the notice, at what time will unclaimed items be donated?
questions.explanation: The notice states that items will be donated at 3:00 PM, which is three in the afternoon.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who want to avoid the electronics processing fee?

options.A: To register their items with campus security
options.B: To pay the fee before donating unwanted items
options.C: To retrieve their electronics before May 30
options.D: To submit a claim form at the Student Union

questions.explanation: Since the $2 fee applies only to electronics reclaimed after May 30, students can avoid it by picking up their electronics before that date.

items.text: The campus garden behind Baxter Hall just extended its spring hours — open now from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM daily starting April 1! I stopped by yesterday and it's such a peaceful spot to study. Come check it out before finals!

questions.stem: According to the post, until what time does the garden stay open?
questions.explanation: The post says the garden is open from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, meaning it closes at six in the evening.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the writer of the post?

options.A: The writer manages the garden's volunteer schedule
options.B: The writer works at Baxter Hall part-time
options.C: The writer enjoys relaxing in the garden
options.D: The writer studies environmental science on campus

questions.explanation: The writer mentions stopping by and calling it a peaceful spot to study, suggesting genuine enjoyment of the garden.

items.text:
Subject: Study Participation Confirmed

Hi Priya, thanks for signing up for the sleep research study! Please arrive at Wilson Lab, Room 305, on Tuesday, April 14, at 10:00 AM. You'll receive $15 in cash after the one-hour session.

Best,
Dr. Osei

questions.stem: According to the email, how much will Priya receive for participating in the study?
questions.explanation: The email states Priya will receive $15 in cash after the session.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about when Priya will receive payment?

options.A: She will be paid before the session begins
options.B: She will be paid through a bank transfer
options.C: She will be paid in the following week
options.D: She will be paid once the session ends

questions.explanation: The email says she will receive the cash after the one-hour session, implying payment occurs once it is finished.

items.text: Free yoga class in the Quad this Saturday, June 20, from 9:00 to 10:00 AM! No sign-up needed, just bring a mat. Classes usually cost $8, but this one's totally free thanks to the Wellness Center! Rain moves it indoors to Gym 2.

questions.stem: According to the post, where will the class be held if it rains?
questions.explanation: The post states that rain moves the class indoors to Gym 2.

questions.stem: According to the post, how much do yoga classes usually cost?
questions.explanation: The post says classes usually cost $8, but this session is free.
